title: Scrambly — Sonic-Themed Super App (Search, Games, Social, Parental Controls)

requirements.text: Create a Sonic franchise-themed search interface that allows users to search for Sonic-related content (characters, games, lore, media) using a curated local knowledge base, with offline search capability using cached data stored on-device.

quotes: its like Google but everything is about the sonic franchise

acceptanceCriteria: A search bar is prominently displayed on the home screen with Sonic-themed branding
Search returns results related to the Sonic franchise (characters, games, media, lore)
Search works offline using previously cached or bundled content
Search results display thumbnails, titles, and short descriptions
Sonic-themed visual styling (colors, icons, fonts) is applied throughout the search UI

requirements.text: Build a games library section with at least two playable in-browser games: a Block Blast-style puzzle game and a Sonic-themed runner game (inspired by Sonic Forces). Games must be playable offline without requiring a network connection.

quotes: Include games in scrambly like block blast
add all of the playable mobile games on scrambler

acceptanceCriteria: A Games section is accessible from the main navigation
A Block Blast-style tile puzzle game is fully playable in the browser
A Sonic-themed endless runner game is fully playable in the browser
Both games function without an internet connection (offline-first)
Games display a Sonic-themed UI with score tracking
Game library page lists all available games with preview thumbnails

requirements.text: Implement a social/community feature that allows registered users to connect with random other users of the same age. Include a community feed where users can post messages. Implement a moderation system that issues warnings for inappropriate behavior, and after repeated violations, locks the user's account requiring them to create a new one.

quotes: help people get to connect with random people who are the same age as the user
a community that warns you for being inappropriate and being rude to kids and kicks you and you have to make a new account

acceptanceCriteria: Users can be matched with and message other users of the same declared age
A community feed allows users to post short messages visible to others
A moderation panel (admin view) can issue warnings to users
After 3 warnings, a user's account is locked and they are shown a message to create a new account
Locked accounts cannot log in or post
Inappropriate content warnings are displayed on the user's profile

requirements.text: Implement age verification on every login using a declared age input form. Users must confirm they are between 10 and 18 years old to access the app. Users outside this range are shown a message and denied access.

quotes: age verification for every time you get in
10 or 18 and to see if you are 11, 12, 13, 14, 15, 16, 17, and 18 are allowed to be in the scrambler

acceptanceCriteria: Every login flow requires the user to confirm their age via a dropdown or input
Ages 10–18 are permitted; any other age results in an access-denied screen
Age verification screen is Sonic-themed and clearly explains the age restriction
Age is stored with the user's session and used for age-matching in social features
No camera-based biometric age detection is used (privacy and reliability concerns)

requirements.text: Implement parental controls including: a configurable usage timer that locks the child out of the app when time is up, a PIN-protected parent dashboard to set the timer and review activity, and a 'kid mode' detection that restricts access to age-appropriate content and games when the logged-in user is under 13.

quotes: add a timer for parents to stop their kids from being on scrambler for too long
detect a kid is on it locking the kid out

acceptanceCriteria: A parent dashboard exists, accessible via a PIN code
Parents can set a daily usage time limit (in minutes) for their child's account
When the usage timer expires, the child is shown a friendly lockout screen and cannot continue using the app
Users aged 10–12 are automatically placed in 'kid mode' with restricted content
Kid mode hides adult-community features and shows only age-appropriate games and content
Parent dashboard shows the child's total session time for the current day

requirements.text: Add an emergency call button visible at all times within the app that, when tapped, opens the device's native phone dialer pre-filled with the local emergency number (e.g., 911). Include a visible 'SOS' button in the app's navigation or footer.
acceptanceCriteria: An SOS/Emergency button is always visible in the app footer or navigation bar
Tapping it opens the device dialer with an emergency number (e.g., 911) pre-filled using a tel: link
A confirmation prompt asks 'Are you sure you want to call emergency services?' before dialing
The button is styled distinctly (e.g., red) so it is easy to find in an emergency

requirements.text: Add a built-in ad blocker indicator/toggle in the app settings that suppresses display of any third-party ad elements within the app's own content areas. Show a visual badge indicating 'Ads Blocked' status.
acceptanceCriteria: App settings include an 'Ad Blocker' toggle that is ON by default
A visible badge or indicator in the UI shows 'Ads Blocked' when enabled
No third-party ad slots or promotional banners appear in the app's content areas when ad blocker is enabled
Toggling the ad blocker off and on persists the preference across sessions

requirements.text: Apply a cohesive Sonic-franchise visual theme across the entire app: use Sonic's iconic color palette (cobalt blue, golden yellow, white, red accents), bold rounded typography, speed-line and ring motifs as decorative elements, and a playful energetic layout consistent with the Sonic brand. Apply this theme consistently to all pages including search, games, community, and settings.

quotes: its like Google but everything is about the sonic franchise

acceptanceCriteria: Primary colors are Sonic blue (#006DB7), golden yellow (#F5C800), and white with red accents
Typography uses bold, rounded fonts evoking the Sonic game aesthetic
Ring and speed-line decorative elements appear as background or UI accents
All major pages (Home/Search, Games, Community, Settings, Parental Controls) share the same theme
App logo/wordmark 'Scrambly' is displayed on the home screen in Sonic-themed styling

constraints: Do not implement camera-based biometric age verification — use form-based age declaration instead
Do not implement real VoIP or P2P offline calling — emergency calling uses a tel: link only
Do not integrate real licensed Sonic Forces game assets — build original Sonic-inspired games
All backend logic must remain in a single Motoko actor (backend/main.mo)
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Real-time WebSocket-based chat or calling infrastructure
Integration with external search engines (Google, Bing, etc.)
Licensing or embedding actual Sega/Sonic Team game binaries
SMS, email, or push notification services

required: Scrambly app logo with bold 'SCRAMBLY' wordmark styled in Sonic-blue and golden-yellow with speed-line accents (scrambly-logo.dim_512x256.png)
Sonic-themed hero banner with rings, speed lines, and cobalt blue gradient background (hero-banner.dim_1200x400.png)
Block Blast game thumbnail preview tile with colorful falling blocks on dark background (game-thumb-blockblast.dim_256x256.png)
Sonic runner game thumbnail preview tile showing a blue hedgehog silhouette sprinting against a green hill backdrop (game-thumb-sonicrunner.dim_256x256.png)
SOS emergency button icon, bold red circle with white lightning bolt (sos-icon.dim_128x128.png)
Parental controls shield icon in golden yellow with a lock symbol (parental-shield-icon.dim_128x128.png)
Scrambly community icon showing two stylized characters facing each other with speech bubbles in Sonic colors (community-icon.dim_128x128.png)
